signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Consumers are spending less on apparel overall, spending less in performance active wear and are being more selective in their purchases, seeking out truly new styles.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We are instituting modest price increases on a small portion of our assortment... we are being very mindful on a style-by-style basis looking at elasticities.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We are reducing our revenue and earnings expectations for the year... we now expect a 1% to 2% decline in revenue [in the U.S.].
